response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience at Google, with relevant expertise in TypeScript, cloud platforms, and Model Context Protocol (MCP). While his direct experience with vector databases and RAG architectures is less explicit, his background in scalable systems, open-source contributions, and technical leadership aligns well with the Staff Forward Deployed Engineer role.
strengths: Proven track record at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta) with hands-on experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
Strong technical leadership and mentorship, evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
Diverse full-stack expertise (TypeScript, Python, cloud platforms) and adaptability to production-grade systems.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of vector databases or RAG architectures in resume, though related experience may exist.
No advanced degree (e.g., Master's/PhD) in AI/CS, though this is a preferred qualification.
Some roles (e.g., Direct Mail automation at Meta) are less directly relevant to GenAI/cloud infrastructure.
